message:
Fix executor docs: finalize() applies to all operators

Rename "Transformations" section to "Non-Source Operators" to correct the
terminology (Input == void means source, not transformation). Move finalize()
and state() documentation to a new "Common Methods" section since these exist
for all operator types, not just transformations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
